nasb.text: The name of the third river is Tigris; it flows east of Assyria. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.

esv.text: And the name of the third river is the Tigris, which flows east of Assyria. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.

cnv.text: 第三道河名叫底格里斯河，就是流向亞述東邊的。第四道河就是幼發拉底河。

ccb.text: 第三条支流名叫底格里斯河，它流经亚述的东边。第四条支流是幼发拉底河。

csbs.text: 第三条河名叫底格里斯，它流过亚述东边。第四条河是幼发拉底。
